config.emi.tooltip.broknowmyemifolder.fo: Replaces matching EMI index entries with KubeJS-defined folded groups.
config.emi.tooltip.broknowmyemifolder.re: Shows a chat message when BKMEF fold groups are loaded or reloaded.
message.broknowmyemifolder.fold_loaded: [BKMEF] Folder loaded: %s groups. Disable: bottom-left EMI settings.
message.broknowmyemifolder.fold_reloaded: [BKMEF] Folder reloaded: %s groups. Disable: bottom-left EMI settings.
